title: Unilock Pavers vs. Stamped Concrete: Which Survives Chicago Winters Better?
intro: As a Chicago homeowner, you dream of a beautiful outdoor patio—a place for summer barbecues, quiet morning coffees, and relaxing evenings. But you also know the harsh reality of our winters. The brutal freeze-thaw cycle can turn a dream patio into a cracked, heaving nightmare. When it comes to choosing your patio material, two popular options emerge: Unilock interlocking pavers and traditional stamped concrete. The question isn't just about looks or initial cost; it's about which material will stand up to the unique challenges of our climate. This guide will give you an expert, head-to-head comparison to help you make the smartest long-term investment for your home.
